reason: NestJS @ApiProperty/@IsString decorator metadata are IIFE (Inversion of Control) — not executable in unit tests. Lines 6,14-16,19-20,22-25,28 are request validation decorators. Architectural ceiling per NestJS framework constraints.
mitigations: DTO validation tested via controller integration tests (service.spec already at 87.5%, controller at 89.47% branch). Cross-tenant isolation verified in tenantId checks.
